items.title: Real-Time AI Health Indicator
items.description: Live AI status badge on all AI-powered pages showing real gateway latency and availability. Tap for details including response time and provider info.

items.title: Dynamic Changelog
items.description: Changelog now loads from a JSON file at runtime instead of being hardcoded. Update release notes without any code changes.

items.title: Settings Page Overhaul
items.description: Added sign-out confirmation, change password flow, privacy toggles for all platforms, account stats card, and guest user prompt.

items.title: Polished Tailor Loading Screen
items.description: Smooth real-feel progress animation with cubic ease-out curve, animated percentage counter, glowing progress bar, estimated time remaining, and fun facts carousel.

items.title: Mobile Scroll Fixes
items.description: Fixed non-scrollable pages on mobile for Job Details, Application Details, Cover Letters, and Notifications pages.

items.title: Enhanced Tailor Step Visualization
items.description: Redesigned step list with vertical connecting lines, spring-animated checkmarks, and highlighted active step with loading spinner.

items.title: Projected Score Preview
items.description: Live projected ATS score comparison (before vs. after) and skill gap count displayed during the tailoring process.

items.title: Smart Progress Estimation
items.description: Estimated time remaining countdown and percentage-based step transitions that adapt to actual backend response time.

items.title: Initial Release
items.description: AI writing assistant, 12 templates, ATS scoring, PDF export, cloud sync, biometric lock, interview prep.
